nasb.text: But one who prophesies speaks to men for edification and exhortation and consolation.

esv.text: On the other hand, the one who prophesies speaks to people for their upbuilding and encouragement and consolation.

cnv.text: 但那講道的是對人講說，使他們得著造就、安慰和勸勉。

ccb.text: 但先知讲道是对人讲的，为了要造就、鼓励、安慰人。

csbs.text: 可是那做先知传道的是对人说，为要造就、鼓励和安慰人。
